@startuml
actor "laboratory coordinator" as LC1
participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as LCUi
controller ":ValidateTestReportController" as VTRC
entity ":Company" as C
database "rp : TestStore" as TS
object "rp : Test" as T
database "rp : TestReportStore" as TRS
object "rp : TestReport" as Trp
control ":TestDiagnosis" as TD

LC1 ->> LCUi: 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis\nactivate LCUi
note over LCUi,VTRC #90EEFF# 
US25_SD_testReportsDTO.puml  
end note 

VTRC->>TS:3 get = testReportsToValidate() \n activate TS
TS-->T:4 get=testList()\n deactivate TS


Trp -->TD:8get=getTestDiagonsis()\ndeactive TD



loop loop
    
    end
    

@enduml
